who: HR operations for small businesses using Gusto, processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR operations for small businesses using Gusto, processing 5–15 payrolls/month, frequent payroll errors cause employee dissatisfaction. We provide weekly payroll error reports instead of manual tracking.
problem: Frequent payroll errors leading to employee dissatisfaction and compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll management
DM outreach to HR operations professionals
Community forums for HR tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try the notification system and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
